title: Schmup 1.5
caption: One of my rare rap tracks
about: From my upcoming Music from Games album Schmup is a song about surviving the bullethell of certain games as a parallel to life.
lyrics:
[Instrumental 1 bar]

[Chorus]
Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shoot ’em up up up up
Life’s like this

Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shoot ’em up up up up
Life’s like this

[Verse 1 – bullet hell as life discipline]

Everythin’ movin’, everythin’ sees, fightin’ lines,
Screen floods, no room, no mercy, no time,
Hitbox skop-ick, life strip’down to some pixels,
Learn fast what survives, learn from the fictionals,
Patterns bloom like fireworks, beauty weaponized,
Petals of death, symmetry test, memorize or die, die
Game over — that’s tuition, pay'it 'til hands don’t wait,
Failure pushes instinct, pain teaches don't break, break.
Edges matter, corners matter, half-steps buy ya' breth, breth
Searchin’ gaps as traders, bet gamblers thread values with debt,
Hedge moves, can’t over-shoot it, withdraw to keep ya' up, up
Sprayin’ fear drains meters, brings heatahs', multiply much
Scrollin’ world pushes red'e'ness, only motion you see,
Same rule n’ streets, the rule n’ feeds, deez rules ya’need,
Ev’ry boss wall of choice pretendin’ to be ’fate, fate,
Buh’ cycles crack when studied, stress folds unda’ weight, wait
Learn rhythm, count your beats, musclemem’ry plus sight,
Hands know truth minds can’t hide— saturation spike, psych
Survive long enough, as chaos teach ya' structure itself,
What presented first like madness reveals the truth of hell.

[Chorus]
Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shoot ’em up up up up
Life’s like this,

Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shoot ’em up up up up
Life’s like this,

[Verse 2 – global pressure, repetition, agency through attrition]

Load up ludic language, pour ovah mechanic names,
New alphabets, mo’ pressure, mo’ velocity, same-game,
Always-on economy speedrunnin’ a'bullet stream philosophy,
Ev'ry sec graded by a pass-fail hidden algorithm, see
No pause for yo rent, no save for yo regret,
Adaptive rout’ing, learn fast what you can’t reset,
Score chasin’ kills you quicker than survival ever will,
High-risk builds offer promise til life an’screen go still,
Lives stacked thin, bombs held tight, hold your fire then deploy,
Burn it all early, talk shit surely, b’fo ya’get destroyed,
Same with trust, same with speed, parlay bet ya' greed,
Hoarding power-ups then flexin’em front of a need, need
Grinding’ runs, repeatin'em, smell anxiety in da air,
Respect through consistency, never pitch tha' you’re ah’ rare,
Silent focus, ritual, discipline, ya' zen the intent,
Calm yourself now - cuz-ya failed to repent,
Consent to chaos, accept the math of the frame,
Don’t dominate a sys gotta outthink’da’game,
Edge-by-edge, life by life, sliding under storms,
Agency built attrition, survival becomes norm,
Screens shed your fears, life sheds tears with no proof,
Hold hands steady, break even, keep standin’ — earn truth,
Still movin’, still alive, keep findin’ where to slide,
As days keeps firin' patterns — while ya’ down to one life.

[Chorus – final, mantra, breath]
Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shoot ’em up up up up
Life’s like this

Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shoot ’em up up up up
Life’s like this

Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shmup Shmup Shmup Shmup
Shoot ’em up up up up
Life’s like this

[Instrumental 2 bars]
